reason: Successfully tested agent messaging functionality - agent responded with correct answer to math question
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully, showing home page with agent list
Found and clicked "QA-20260331-205055-hcgn" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page loaded, showing agent name and status
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status confirmed as "idle" which is acceptable per requirements (running or idle)
Clicked on message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully entered in the input field
Clicked send button to submit message - Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", activity indicator appeared showing "Working..."
Waited for response - Response received within approximately 2 seconds (well under the 3-minute limit), activity indicator disappeared, agent status returned to "idle"
Verified response mentions "4" - Response clearly shows "4" as the answer, which correctly answers the question "What is 2+2?"
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4", along with metadata showing "Worked for 2s"
